title: Google Summer of Code - GSoC Contributor
snippet: Google Summer of Code is a global, online program focused on bringing new contributors into open source software development. GSoC Contributors work with an open source organization on a 12+ week programming project under the guidance of mentors.

title: Alation Marketing Intern
snippet: Jessica joined Alation for a Marketing Intern role, discovered with Simplify's help. This internship offers experience in marketing functions within the company.

title: Simplify Jobs - Summer 2026 Tech Internships Collection
snippet: This repository offers a collection of tech internships for the Summer 2026 term. It serves as a valuable resource for students, with its last update occurring on March 4, 2026.

title: Simplify Jobs - New Grad Full-Time Roles Collection (SWE, Quant, PM)
snippet: This repository compiles full-time roles in Software Engineering, Quantitative, and Product Management for new graduates. It functions as a helpful resource, having been last updated on March 4, 2026.

title: Google Summer of Code - Mentor Organization
snippet: Organizations can apply to be a mentor organization for the Google Summer of Code program, helping bring new developers to their open source community. Please note that organization registration for this program is currently closed.

title: Simplify Backend Take-Home Project Assessment
snippet: This public repository hosts a backend take-home project, designed to evaluate candidates for potential backend roles at Simplify. The assessment, last updated on March 2, 2026, is part of the hiring process for their US-based operations.

title: Simplify WebExtension Take-Home Project Assessment
snippet: This repository features a take-home project likely used to assess candidates for web extension development roles at Simplify. Although no description is provided, it was last updated on February 7, 2026, for roles within their United States team.

title: MaintainX Software Development Intern
snippet: MaintainX is looking for a Software Development Intern to join their highly motivated team in Montreal, Canada. In this hybrid role, you will help develop new features, perform web development, maintain code, and research new technologies, working alongside talented software engineers.
